theme: The Criminal Trade in Ancient Objects

sentences.english: BBC reporter Ryan Keane recently bought a 1,800-year-old Roman coin in London.
sentences.korean: BBC 기자 라이언 킨이 최근 런던에서 1800년 된 로마 동전을 샀어요.

sentences.english: But soon afterwards, he discovered there was more to the story.
sentences.korean: 하지만 곧 이야기에 더 많은 것이 있다는 걸 발견했죠.

sentences.english: I came across reports of expansive criminal networks related to antiquities.
sentences.korean: 골동품과 관련된 광범위한 범죄 네트워크에 대한 보고서를 접했어요.

sentences.english: Some ancient artefacts being sold online and in stores have been looted and trafficked.
sentences.korean: 온라인과 상점에서 판매되는 일부 고대 유물이 약탈되고 밀거래된 것이었어요.

quiz.question: What does '출처, 유래 — 물건이 어디서 왔는지의 기록' mean in English?
